prompt: I just ran `read alice` and got a list of messages. Message at index 3 has a typo. How do I fix it, and how do I also add a thumbs-up reaction to message at index 1?

assertions.text: Includes react command with index 1 and thumbs-up emoji
Correctly explains that read was already done (does not require re-running read)
assertions.check: response does not wrongly require running read again before edit/react

assertions.text: Provides correct go run . invocation style
